channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Paul Gallen questions whether NRL clubs should pursue Jarome Luai for the 2027 season following his Wests Tigers exit
item.description: Former NRL player Paul Gallen has cautioned clubs against attempting to sign Jarome Luai for the 2027 season, citing the reported deterioration of Luai's relationship with the Wests Tigers before his ...

item.title: Jovial apologizes after DNA test clears Otile of paternity
item.description: Kenyan musician Jovial has publicly apologized to singer Otile Brown following revelations that a DNA test ruled out Otile as the biological father of one of her children. The apology came after Otile...

item.title: Tanzania faces delays in $420 million gas-to-liquid plant due to gas supply concerns
item.description: Tanzania's $420 million gas-to-liquid (GTL) plant project, backed by Canadian firm Rocky Mountain GTL and local partners, faces delays as it awaits a gas supply agreement with the Tanzania Petroleum D...

item.title: Renaissance and Indorama ink 16-year gas pact to support Nigeria's fertiliser industry
item.description: Renaissance Africa Energy Company Limited has signed a landmark 16-year gas supply agreement with Indorama Fertiliser FZE, securing a steady feedstock for one of Nigeria's largest fertilizer producers...

item.title: Australia's EV Charger Strategy: Quality Over Quantity
item.description: The article discusses Australia's approach to expanding electric vehicle (EV) charging infrastructure, highlighting a strategic advantage in learning from global leaders while prioritizing quality ove...

item.title: US-Iran Conflict Escalates with Attacks on Gulf Nations and Hormuz Strait
item.description: The article details the ongoing military confrontation between the United States and Iran, which has intensified with recent attacks on Gulf states and the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz. Follow...

item.title: Democrats Criticize Lindsey Graham's Legacy Amid Posthumous Tributes
item.description: Following the unexpected death of U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham, Democratic colleagues expressed tributes to his career, highlighting his humor and negotiation skills. However, critics argue these tribu...

item.title: Ram Temple Trust to Appoint First CEO to Address Management Issues and Embezzlement Concerns
item.description: The Sri Ram Janmabhoomi Tirath Kshetra Trust has announced the search for its first chief executive officer (CEO) to professionalize the management of the Ram Mandir complex following allegations of e...

item.title: Ontario Faces Uncertainty Over $8M U.S. Alcohol Stockpile
item.description: The Ontario government continues to store nearly $80 million worth of U.S. alcohol in its warehouses, with taxpayers spending approximately $8 million on storage costs. CBC News obtained internal reco...

item.title: Malawian Woman Accused of R10 Million Theft in South Africa
item.description: A 28-year-old Malawian woman, identified as Fatima Lawerence (also known as Esther), is being sought by South African authorities following an alleged theft from her employer's residence in Durban. Th...

item.title: NBI Confirms No Evidence Found Against Sara Duterte's Alleged Hired Killer
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) has confirmed there is still no evidence or trace of Sara Duterte’s alleged contracted hitman, despite ongoing inquiries. The statement comes amid heightened...

item.title: Security forces kill 114 terrorists in Balochistan's Operation Shaban
item.description: Security forces have killed 114 terrorists in Balochistan during Operation Shaban and related intelligence operations since July 5, according to state media. The operation, launched after a July 7 att...

item.title: Air Canada and Union Reach Tentative Agreement on Technical and Logistics Staff
item.description: Air Canada has reached a tentative collective agreement with the International Association of Machinists and Aerospace Workers (IAMAW) union, which represents approximately 11,000 technical, logistics...

item.title: Murang'a Woman Convicted of Manslaughter After Husband's Death
item.description: Joyce Mwangi, a mother of three from Murang'a County, was jailed for seven years after her husband died in a violent altercation. The court convicted her of manslaughter in June 2026 but ruled her sev...

item.title: Andy Burnham's Impact on English Football Reforms and Governance
item.description: The article explores Andy Burnham's significant contributions to English football governance, highlighting his role in shaping key reforms. Burnham, a Labour politician, has been instrumental in initi...

item.title: Punjab leader criticizes OTT platform for removing film highlighting state-sanctioned killings
item.description: Sukhbir Singh Badal, president of the Shiromani Akali Dal (SAD), has strongly condemned the removal of Diljit Dosanjh's film 'Satluj' from ZEE5, calling it an assault on Punjab's collective memory and...

item.title: President Samia Highlights Tanzania's Commitment to Human Rights
item.description: President Samia Suluhu has emphasized Tanzania's dedication to advancing human rights, highlighting progress made while acknowledging ongoing challenges. During a speech at the African Union's Inter-P...

item.title: Content Creators Capture Mysterious Sky Object in Backgrounds
item.description: A mysterious object streaking across the sky in the backgrounds of content creators has sparked widespread speculation on social media. Initially mistaken for a meteor or shooting star, the object's u...

item.title: UK triple-murder suspect to face firearm trial in South Africa before extradition
item.description: Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, a 45-year-old British citizen of Zimbabwean heritage, is set to face trial in South Africa for unlawful possession of an unlicensed 9mm firearm before his extradition to the ...

item.title: Trump praises would-be assassin's academic achievements after 2024 assassination attempt
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump delivered an unusual and contradictory statement on Fox & Friends, discussing the 2024 assassination attempt by Thomas Crooks. While criticizing the Secret Service's...
